findings.evidence: `JHolomorphicEnergy.lean:125-131` proves nonnegativity via the area identity and `hF`; but `AlmostComplex.lean:319-323` gives `associatedBilinForm_apply`, and `TameMetric.lean:91` gives `SymplecticForm.Tames.symplecticForm_apply_apply_self_nonneg (h : ω.Tames J) (v : V)`, which applies separately to `F stdComplexLineReal` and `F stdComplexLineImag`.
findings.fix: Prove the general lemma, e.g. `SymplecticForm.stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_nonneg (hω : ω.Tames J) (F : (ℝ × ℝ) →ₗ[ℝ] V) : 0 ≤ ω.stdComplexLineEnergyDensity J F`, and derive or replace the derivative variants without holomorphicity/unique-differentiability assumptions.
findings.issue: `stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_nonneg` requires `hF : IsComplexLinearMap ...`; the derived `fderiv_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_nonneg` and `fderivWithin_stdComplexLineEnergyDensity_nonneg` at lines 170 and 223 likewise require `hf`/`hs`, but nonnegativity of `g(F ∂s,F ∂s)+g(F ∂t,F ∂t)` does not use complex-linearity.

summary: The energy identity statements sit at a natural level, but the nonnegativity API carries unnecessary holomorphicity/complex-linearity hypotheses. Tameness alone makes each associated-metric diagonal term nonnegative.
